function.name: lookup_client
function.description: Look up an existing client record by email address. Use this when you need to check whether a client is already in the CRM before creating a new one. Returns the client id if found, null otherwise. Example: lookup_client(email='ada@example.com').

email.description: The client's primary email address, exactly as provided in the inquiry.

function.name: create_client_record
function.description: Create a new client record in the CRM. Use this when a client onboarding request has passed the lookup_client duplicate check. Returns the new client id. Example: create_client_record(name='Ada Lovelace', email='ada@example.com').

name.description: The client's full legal name as it should appear on contracts.

email.description: The client's primary email address; used as the unique business key.

function.name: send_welcome_email
function.description: Send the firm's welcome email to a newly created client. Use this only after create_client_record succeeds. Example: send_welcome_email(client_id='c_123', template='firm_a').

template.description: Welcome template key, scoped to the originating firm.
